name: Autoresearch Task
description: Implement BM25 scoring with tuned k1 and b parameters to replace or augment the current ranking function, specifically optimizing term frequency saturation (k1=1.2-1.5) and field length normalization (b=0.6-0.75) based on the document collection characteristics
